name: Anay Dhaval Pandya
title: cybersecurity student · ai/ml systems builder
synopsis: Specializing in the intersection of AI, automated security, and digital forensics.
bio:
I'm Anay Dhaval Pandya — a third-year Computer Science student specializing in Cybersecurity at the National Forensic Sciences University - Gandhinagar. I explore the intersections of AI, automated security, and digital forensics, architecting robust solutions that blend practicality with curiosity.

From engineering serverless cloud compliance frameworks to building LLM-driven intelligence tools and anti-forensics detection systems, I'm chasing the "why" behind the tech. I draw heavily from the Stark principle: engineering that feels alive — intuitive, elegant, and human. When I'm not buried in terminal windows, I'm analyzing how networks trust or how intelligence emerges in code.

My current focus lies in bridging human intent and machine execution — creating robust, contextual systems that adapt to complex security landscapes.
